description: This wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Dimensions : 9 cm x 12 cm Made of blended fabric in khaki Two main compartments Two insert pockets One zippered pocket Multi card slots inside One pocket with a clap button Contrast stitch detailing on the cover, with embossed brand name on the front Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
